_comment: Opportunity: Spirit Vein Collapse. Per opportunity directive: the engine continuously asks 'what opportunities naturally exist at a location that has existed for 50000 years?'. Discoverable by cultivation (Core Formation), perception (Nascent Soul (to perceive the collapse)), and luck (modifier 0.7). Prime Directive: opportunity exists objectively; player perception determines whether they find it.
name: Spirit Vein Collapse
description: A spirit vein in the process of collapsing, releasing its essence. Exists because: spirit veins have lifespans; collapse releases vast essence.
why_untaken: Collapse is rare and brief; requires timing.
natural_next_event: Collapse completes; essence disperses; beasts converge.

simulation_notes.continuous_inference: The World State Engine continuously infers opportunities at every location based on the location's age, type, and history.
simulation_notes.no_locked_upgrades: A cultivator who later reaches the required perception will find opportunities they previously missed; the opportunities do not disappear.
simulation_notes.canon_fidelity: This is how Wang Lin found inheritances throughout his journey — the opportunities existed before he arrived; his perception determined what he found.

karmic_weight.description: No specific karmic consequence recorded in canon
